SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOSS, CYNTHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATON, LARRY E. PRIMERITUS $2,062.20 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,142.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PRIMERITUS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-25-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRIMERITUS WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRIS MCGUINNESS---V/P GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED.
